description: A front desk staff member needs to register a new patient for their first appointment.

nodes.task_description: Search for the patient in the EHR to ensure they are not already in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms no existing patient record is found.

nodes.task_description: Enter the patient's demographic information, including name, DOB, address, and contact details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately creates a new patient chart with all required demographic data.

nodes.task_description: Scan the patient's photo ID and insurance card and upload them to their chart.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully attaches the document images to the new patient record.
